import cv2
import tensorflow as tf

# Load model
model = tf.keras.applications.MobileNetV2(weights="imagenet")
# Load and preprocess image
img = cv2.imread("image.jpg")
img_resized = cv2.resize(img, (224, 224))
img_preprocessed = tf.keras.applications.mobilenet_v2.preprocess_input(img_resized)
# Run inference
predictions = model.predict(tf.expand_dims(img_preprocessed, axis=0))
decoded = tf.keras.applications.mobilenet_v2.decode_predictions(predictions, top=3)[0]
for _, label, prob in decoded:
    print(f"{label}: {prob:.2%}")
print("Image classification pipeline complete!")
